Date: 1st November 2023

Dr. Tan Wei Ming  
123 Orchard Road  
Singapore 238888  

Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Analyst at Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456B). Your monthly salary will be SGD 8,500, payable on the last working day of each month. 

You will report directly to Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Head of Research, starting on 1st December 2023. Please reach out to her at +65 6123 4567 or at aishah.abdullah@quantumdyn.sg for any preliminary discussions.

For administrative purposes, please provide a copy of your NRIC, S1234567A, during the onboarding process. Should you have any queries, feel free to contact our HR department at hr@quantumdyn.sg.

Yours sincerely,

Ramasamy Muthu  
Director of Human Resources  
Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd.  

[Signature Line]
